Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Item Category
Fields.Description: The category of item this table references.

Fields.Name: Roll Weight
Fields.Description: The weighting to apply during the roll.

Fields.Name: Quantity
Fields.Description: The number of stacks the player picks up.

Fields.Name: Only For Hero
Fields.Description: Only roll this entry if the player's hero matches.

Fields.Name: Acquisition Flag
Fields.Description: Sets this event flag ON when the lot is selected.

Fields.Name: Weapon Type Discovery
Fields.Description: Only roll this entry if the player has a matching weaponTypeDiscovery. Related relic SpEffect will overwrite the default one.
